display.purpose: Screen heroes and large titles only.

title.purpose: Card titles and list-row primaries — the workhorse style.

shadows.name: glass-ambient
shadows.purpose: Soft ambient lift under glass cards; finish, never structure.

shadows.name: glass-ambient-tinted
shadows.purpose: Accent-tinted lift under selected/active glass surfaces.

motion.name: slide
motion.purpose: Horizontal slide for detail-screen navigation (iOS-style push).

motion.name: fade
motion.purpose: Crossfade between bottom-nav tabs; reduced-motion alternative everywhere.

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: The workhorse surface: blurred translucent glass over the ambient wash, 20dp radius, 1.5dp hairline, soft ambient shadow.
components.html: Tonight's dinnerTaco Friday — 6 of 8 ingredients bought
components.css: .ds-glass-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px); border-radius: 20px; padding: 18px; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(20,26,60,0.12), inset 0 0 0 1.5px rgba(22,25,42,0.10); color: #16192A; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-glass-card strong { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 23px; } .ds-glass-card span { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; color: #5F6780; }

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Brand CTA carrying the one sanctioned gradient (identity surfaces only); standard primaries use the flat Heirloom Indigo fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5457E8, #7C3AED); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 18px; padding: 14px 24px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.15s ease-out, transform 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); filter: brightness(0.94); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4F55E6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Surface
components.description: Completed / empty items recede: no blur, no shadow, faint fill, dashed hairline.
components.css: .ds-ghost { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.36); border: 1px dashed rgba(95,103,128,0.28); border-radius: 20px; padding: 14px 18px; color: #8B92AC; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; } .ds-ghost span { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.4px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Feature Badge
components.description: The wayfinding atom: rounded-square translucent accent fill with the feature icon stroked in its accent. The only home of feature color.
components.css: .ds-feature-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(245,158,11,0.16); }

components.name: Floating Tab Bar
components.description: Floating glass chrome pill that blurs content scrolling beneath it; active glyph takes the interactive accent.
components.html: HomeCalendarChatFamilyProfile
components.css: .ds-tab-bar { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(22px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px); border-radius: 33px; padding: 8px 10px; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(20,26,60,0.10), inset 0 0 0 1.5px rgba(22,25,42,0.10); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tab { padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 24px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.4px; color: #5F6780; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { background: rgba(79,85,230,0.08); } .ds-tab-active { color: #4F55E6; background: rgba(79,85,230,0.14); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Glass-filled field, 16dp radius; focus shifts the border to the single interactive accent.
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); border: 1.5px solid rgba(22,25,42,0.10); border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #16192A; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5F6780; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #4F55E6; }

narrative.overview: The Family App is a warm family home seen through calm glass. Every screen is built from translucent, softly blurred surfaces floating over an ambient canvas — three radial washes of violet (top-right), indigo (left), and teal (bottom) over a near-white or near-black base. The glass is the identity: content sits on it, chrome floats as it, and completed things fade out of it. The mood is warm, premium, calm — a household that has its act together, never a dashboard and never a toy. The system ships identically on two native platforms: Jetpack Compose (with Haze blur, Glass.kt) and SwiftUI (Glass.swift), sharing the same hex values, radii, spacing, and channel of restraint. Brand lives in the material and the light, not in loud color: large surfaces are always neutral glass, and hue appears only in small, meaningful doses.
keyCharacteristics: Translucent glass surfaces over a three-wash ambient canvas, in both light and dark
One quiet interactive accent (Heirloom Indigo); feature hues confined to badges and dots
Generous, differentiated corner radii (12–33dp) as the main shape voice
Platform system type (Roboto / SF Pro) on a tight, iOS-flavored scale
Depth by material — blur and translucency first, soft ambient shadow second
Graceful degradation: below Android API 31 glass becomes a translucent solid and the UI stays legible

rules.name: The Badge Rule
rules.body: Feature accents live only in icon badges and calendar event dots — never on large surfaces. A screen's identity comes from its glass, not from flooding it with its feature hue.

rules.name: The One Gradient Rule
rules.body: The brand gradient (#5457E8 → #7C3AED) is the only sanctioned gradient and may appear only on identity surfaces: hero headers, outgoing chat bubbles, the brand primary CTA, and the Home family banner. Never as a generic card or background fill.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: One family, weights 400–700, nothing else. No display faces, no mono, no decorative type. Emphasis is weight and size, never a second font.

rules.name: The sp Rule
rules.body: All type in sp (Android) / Dynamic Type-relative (iOS) so it follows the user's system text size. Hard-coded pixel sizes are prohibited.

rules.name: The Ghost Rule
rules.body: Completed and empty things recede by losing their material: a ghost surface has no blur, no shadow, a faint translucent fill, and a dashed 1dp hairline. Done items don't get louder decoration — they get less.

rules.name: The No Structural Shadow Rule
rules.body: If removing the shadow makes the layout unreadable, the surface is wrong. Fix the material, not the shadow.

dos: Do build every screen inside AmbientBackground and compose surfaces from the glass helpers (glassCard, glassChrome, glassBar, ghostSurface) — never hand-roll a blur or a card style.
Do use MaterialTheme.colorScheme / semantic tokens for all color, and Spacing / Radius tokens for all metrics; 20dp screen edges, 18dp card padding, 4-pt grid.
Do keep secondary text at #5F6780 (light) / #98A0BC (dark) or stronger — Slate500-strength grays fail WCAG AA on the light canvas.
Do design and test both themes and both platforms; the hex values, radii, and channel names are shared contracts (Glass.kt ↔ Glass.swift) — change them in pairs.
Do verify every glass surface is legible in the API < 31 fallback (translucent solid, no blur).
donts: Don't let it read as a kids' app / cartoon — no mascots, no bubbly primary-color chrome; adults must feel this is a serious, premium tool.
Don't let it read as a generic Material template — a stock M3 scaffold with default surfaces and tonal chips is off-brand; the glass identity must be present on every screen.
Don't let it read as a corporate productivity tool — no dense enterprise chrome, no gray utilitarianism, no urgency theater.
Don't put feature accents on large surfaces (the Badge Rule) or add any gradient beyond the sanctioned brand gradient (the One Gradient Rule).
Don't use structural shadows, opaque hard-edged cards, or a second font family.
Don't hardcode colors, dp paddings, or px font sizes at call sites — if it isn't a token, it doesn't ship.
